# Architecture diagrams

Rendered from the editable `*.drawio` sources in this folder. The SVGs
display inline on GitHub (including the mobile site and app). Tap **Open in
the diagrams.net viewer** for an interactive, zoomable version — the whole
diagram travels in the URL fragment, so nothing is uploaded to any server.
